description: A ground-level photograph depicts an extensive landscape of olive groves, particularly prominent in the foreground and mid-ground. The terrain is undulating and appears dry, with sparse scrub vegetation and a dirt track in the immediate foreground. In the distant mid-ground, a village or small town is visible. Large, rocky mountains form the backdrop under a clear blue sky. The image likely serves as an example for the CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class "2.2.2.0 Olive Groves".
